summary: Restores dozens of small template-compatible SDK translation units (dolphin OS/GX/VI/SI/DVD/EXI, trk, crt) from the previous campaign archive as non-linked CodeCandidate units, raising matched functions 9->22 and matched code bytes 616->720 across 90 total units.
decomp_lessons: When a reclaimed unit is byte-exact standalone but fails the final DOL SHA check as a *linked* Matching substitution, keep it registered as a non-linked CodeCandidate instead of forcing it in as Matching -- this preserves the canonical build while still surfacing honest progress in objdiff/decomp.dev.
Small SDK leaf functions (OSArena.c 4/4 funcs, udp_cc.c 9/9 funcs) are cheap, low-risk reclaims: verify each unit's function/byte counts individually before folding many into one PR.
smart_moves: Explicitly trialed the units as linked Matching first, caught the DOL SHA failure, and downgraded them to non-linked CodeCandidate rather than silently merging a broken linked state.
assembly_or_matching_tactics: Verified per-unit metrics before merging: OSArena 4/4 functions 32/32 bytes 100%, udp_cc 9/9 functions 72/72 bytes 100%.
Ran an active-tree scan for .inc includes / inline asm across src, include, configure.py, tools to ensure no asm-wrapper stubs snuck into the reclaim.

key_files.role: Registers ~50 reclaimed SDK/trk/crt units as Object(CodeCandidate, ...), 326 lines added
Adds dtk text splits for OSArena.c, udp_cc.c, and dozens of other tiny SDK units
Reclaimed exact unit, 4/4 functions, 32/32 bytes, 100% match
Reclaimed exact unit, 9/9 functions, 72/72 bytes, 100% match
